hero.label: NAVA PEACE
hero.title: BORN TO GROW
today.heading:
TODAY
HUMANITY
CHOOSES PEACE
today.subtitle: NAVA PEACE is a global movement that unites millions of hearts through a simple daily act of peace.
today.why_text: Peace is fragile. We believe it must be made visible and practiced daily by everyone.
today.how_text: We created a global system that turns simple daily actions into a visible, connected movement.
today.what_text: A platform, a community, and a technology that allow anyone to join and spread peace worldwide.
first.heading: NAVA PEACE IS THE WORLD'S FIRST TECHNOLOGICAL TOOL DESIGNED TO MAKE PEACE VISIBLE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN HUMAN HISTORY
first.li1: Making every human being a beacon of peace.
first.li2: Transforming a simple gesture into a global revolution.
first.li3: Making peace as visible as a vote.
first.li4: Putting peace online... and in the spotlight.
first.li5: Creating the first global peace counter.
first.li6: Revealing what humanity has never been able to measure: peace.
first.li7: Transforming peace into a collective force.
app.heading: THE NAVA PEACE APP
app.subheading: The NAVA PEACE initiative will use an app to unite the world.
app.phone1:
A simple app for all,
the quest time for PEACE.
app.phone2:
I am the Spirit of Peace.
Today, I choose PEACE
for all, for always.
app.phone3_text: May this quest fill you with light, love, joy, peace.
app.phone4:
Understanding conflict
is the first step to peace.
app.quote:
"A SIMPLE APP FOR MAN,
A GIANT LEAP FOR PEACE"
app.desc_p1: At the heart of the movement: simple, meaningful, and designed for mass participation, it's built on Web3 technology for greater speed, security, and a transparent ecosystem.
app.desc_p2: It will be our playground for the next 180 days, and actions are accessible to everyone:
vision.heading:
OUR VISION FOR
NAVA PEACE
vision.text: NAVA PEACE aims to become the first global WEB3 ecosystem entirely built around peace, dignity and solidarity.
community.title: Global Community
community.p1: Everyone can join us. We will give PEACE the value it deserves. Everyone, regardless of country, age, or religion, is welcome at NAVA PEACE. Peace is everyone's business. There's no point in talking about climate change if peace doesn't take hold.
community.quote1: "If war is a market, then peace must become an economic force."
community.p_funding1:
The magic of blockchain in action. All our transactions, funding, decisions, and actions will be visible.
Every move by NAVA PEACE will be publicly accountable.
community.p_future:
begins with a sustainable and peaceful economy.
From darkness will spring forth infinite, powerful, joyful, and humane light.
community.quote2:
"History remembers those who have funded revolutions.
This time, the revolution is peaceful."
community.cta: Together, let's create the first economy of PEACE.
community.p_goal: Our ultimate goal is to rethink the current economic model based on war... enough is enough! A peace economy is not a utopia. Billions of us around the world are calling for peace, but our governments remain deaf to our pleas. Peace, not just a ceasefire, but lasting and stable peace for everyone, everywhere.
community.p_consensus1: How do financial institutions work? By consensus.
community.p_consensus2: What is consensus? Consensus means that everyone agrees on the same truth. Printed paper = money.
community.p_consensus3: So let's take the next step: NAVA PEACE is the first economy of peace.
community.p_web3: We will create a network of people who recognise that the NAVA PEACE token is a currency, and that we can use it with complete confidence, just like any fiat currency. Welcome to Web3.
manifesto.heading:
PHILOSOPHICAL
MANIFESTO
manifesto.quote1:
"Every day, humanity has a choice.
Today, we choose peace."
manifesto.p1: There is a moment, invisible yet decisive, when a civilization chooses what it wants to become. This moment is neither political, nor religious, nor economic. It is internal, silent, individual.
manifesto.p2: It is made of a gesture, an intention, a choice. This gesture is peace. And this choice belongs to us. NAVA PEACE is the global framework that transforms this intimate choice into a visible, measurable, and powerful force.
manifesto.p3: NAVA PEACE is born from a simple and profound conviction:
manifesto.li1: Peace is not an event. It is a practice.
manifesto.li2: And it begins within each of us.
manifesto.p4: It depends neither on governments, nor treaties, nor the powerful, but on the quiet strength of ordinary hearts that choose not to give in to fear or hatred.
manifesto.p5:
Every time a human being clicks the button, "Today, I commit to peace, for everyone, everywhere in the world," they are affirming something that transcends them: peace is possible, here and now, starting from within. It is an act that is both humble and revolutionary.
We are the generation that refuses to accept the inevitability of violence.
manifesto.p6: For centuries, the world has learned to structure war: armies, strategies, budgets, alliances, and industries. But humanity has never built an infrastructure for peace. A global structure where every individual can participate, where every gesture counts, and where every act of peace tangibly strengthens the world.
manifesto.p7: NAVA PEACE is that first structure.
manifesto.li5: A planetary ritual of compassion and unity.
manifesto.quote2: "Peace is not a theory. It is a discipline."
manifesto.p8: It is cultivated like a muscle, practiced like an art. It demands presence, effort, and consistency.
manifesto.p9: A daily gesture repeated by millions of people becomes a civilizational direction. A planetary habit. A movement that transcends borders, languages, religions, and identities. When we choose peace each morning, we train ourselves to be stronger than our fears, stronger than our wounds, more serene than our anger.
manifesto.p10: We become human beings capable of loving the world despite its shadows.
manifesto.li6: those who refuse to respond to violence with violence.
manifesto.li7: For those who know that peace is not naive, but courageous.
manifesto.li8: To those who understand that peace is not a weakness, but a strength.
manifesto.li9: To those who see peace not as a dream, but as a daily endeavor.
manifesto.li10: To those who, wounded, choose healing rather than passing on the pain.
manifesto.li11: To those who have lost everything, but refuse to lose their humanity.
manifesto.li12: To those who dream of a world where our children no longer have to choose between fear and freedom.
manifesto.p13: NAVA PEACE is our silent pledge.
manifesto.p14:
We cannot change the past. But we can create a future where peace is no longer the exception, but the norm.
A future where the world rises each day, gesture by gesture, heart by heart, click by click. A future where peace is no longer a word, but a movement.
manifesto.p15: We are the light-bearers of this century.
manifesto.li13: We are those who refuse resignation.
manifesto.li15: Those who want to build a world where human dignity is stronger than hatred.
manifesto.li18: We are the dawn of a new world.
manifesto.li19: And every day, with a simple gesture,
manifesto.li20: we write together the most beautiful sentence in the history of humankind:
manifesto.quote3:
"Today, for me, for you,
for us, I choose peace."
blockchain.heading: NAVA PEACE BLOCKCHAIN
blockchain.p1: Our blockchain brings together all the essential pillars of a next-generation infrastructure. Designed for uncompromising security, seamless scalability, ultra-low fees, and radical eco-efficiency, it sets a new benchmark for responsible innovation.
blockchain.stat: 100 times less energy-intensive than the Bitcoin blockchain.
blockchain.p2: Completely decentralized, it will be supported by a robust developer ecosystem. Its architecture is designed for long-term stability, giving it all the attributes to become one of the most reliable and transformative blockchains of our time.
blockchain.p3: With NAVA PEACE, we don't just follow technological evolution, we shape it.
blockchain.p4: Today, businesses, AI systems, and digital infrastructures are creating a level of complexity that traditional decision-making models can no longer handle.
blockchain.p5: Interactions are accelerating, risks are propagating faster, and modern systems are behaving more like living ecosystems than predictable machines.
blockchain.p6: To address this paradigm shift, we are developing "Nexus42."
blockchain.p8: "Nexus42" is a distributed intelligence platform designed to:
blockchain.nexus_li1: analyze any system simultaneously across multiple scales (micro/meso/macro),
blockchain.nexus_li2: automatically detect inconsistencies, risks, and emerging instabilities,
blockchain.nexus_li3: calculate optimal trajectories using our proprietary FASAT engine, a multi-layered fractal evaluation model.
blockchain.p10:
to offer organizations a "consistency autopilot" for their processes, decisions, and AI systems.
This creates a new standard for understanding, stabilizing, and orchestrating complex environments.
blockchain.forge_title: "The Forge": the modular engine at the heart of "Nexus42"
blockchain.forge_p1: At the core of "Nexus42" is "The Forge," our programmable system for generating, assembling, and validating modular intelligence components.
blockchain.forge_li4: and even modular smart contracts for blockchain infrastructures.
blockchain.forge_li5: GoldSmith, which interprets high-level requirements and assembles the optimal set of analytical building blocks,
blockchain.forge_li6: The Notary, which ensures integrity, deterministic behavior, and compliance,
blockchain.forge_li7: The Client, which builds the final application or its interface via a dedicated mini-forge.
blockchain.forge_p4:
This architecture allows Nexus42 to evolve like a living organism. It can generate new capabilities on demand while preserving overall consistency and verifiability.
In other words, "The Forge" is the engine that manufactures intelligence in a secure, modular, and transparent way.
blockchain.chess_p1: To demonstrate the power of the model, we developed "ChessChain," a system where each chess move becomes a block in a chain that evaluates:
blockchain.chess_li3: and the overall stability of the game.
blockchain.chess_p2: "ChessChain" proves that a fractal engine, enhanced by "The Forge," can capture, analyze, and predict the dynamics of a complex system in real time, with perfect scalability.
blockchain.chess_p3: It is the first modular chain ever created where governance, analysis, and consistency are all generated by the same underlying engine.
blockchain.why_p1: Multi-agent AI, algorithmic governance, and intelligent cybersecurity are exploding.
blockchain.why_p2: a system capable of measuring, generating, and stabilizing consistency across layers.
blockchain.why_p3: "Nexus42," powered by "The Forge," fills this gap.
blockchain.why_p4: We are building the fractal infrastructure of the future, a universal interpretation and orchestration layer for complex systems, with the ability to generate custom logic, agents, and contracts on demand.
blockchain.why_p5:
It's a new category:
Self-structuring intelligence for a multi-agent world.
blockchain.nut_li1: "Nexus42" creates a universal consistency language for complex systems.
blockchain.nut_li2: "The Forge" builds the modular intelligence that makes it possible.
blockchain.nut_li4: We are building the fractal GPS of the AI age.
foundation.heading:
NAVA PEACE
FOUNDATION
foundation.subheading: A transparent and action-oriented foundation that supports victims of war and funds peace initiatives.
foundation.p_humanitarian: Medical aid, food aid, water treatment, prosthetics, psychological support.
foundation.p_reconstruction: Homes, hearts, souls, hope for all, everywhere, using the rubble to build new structures.
foundation.p_transparency: Thanks to blockchain technology, every NAVA PEACE token spent will be publicly accountable.
foundation.p1: 50% of the tokens issued will be managed by the NAVA PEACE Foundation for Peace, administered by a board of directors composed of honorary and elected members.
foundation.li6: training and installation of green energy systems
foundation.li7: 3D printing of prosthetics and essential items
foundation.li8: a global fleet of volunteers ready to respond
foundation.p3: A global rapid response network will be deployed to provide immediate assistance to crisis zones.
howtoplay.heading: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW.
howtoplay.sub1: How to play? How to Improve?
howtoplay.sub2: How to win? And most importantly... why?
howtoplay.intro_p1: To change the world, our world, we don't need billions of dollars.
howtoplay.intro_p2:
WE NEED AN IDEA.
AN IDEA CAPABLE OF CHANGING THE WORLD.
We need NAVA PEACE.
howtoplay.intro_p3:
We need you, me, all of us, to commit daily to a simple idea:
PEACE IS POSSIBLE, EVERYWHERE FOR EVERYONE.
howtoplay.intro_p4: Together, we will bring peace to the world and change everything, because in a world where war is omnipresent, darkness darkens our dreams and hopes. Together, by believing in a better future, we can achieve it.
howtoplay.intro_p5:
BE THE CHANGE YOU WISH TO SEE IN THE WORLD.
GANDHI!
howtoplay.intro_p6: NAVA PEACE's success is based on engagement through gamification.
howtoplay.intro_p7: The season will last 180 days. It is during this time that we will sow the seeds of change and build our global community.
howtoplay.intro_p8: I hope that millions, billions of us will play every day and share with our friends.
howtoplay.intro_p9: Every time you open the app to play, you are choosing a better future for us and for future generations.
howtoplay.intro_p10: Consciously, you will be participating in a new form of economy: the economy of peace.
howtoplay.start_title: How to start playing NAVA PEACE?
howtoplay.start_li1: Download the app via the official link: www.nava-peace.app
howtoplay.start_li4: You will automatically receive your first badge: PEACE LOVER
howtoplay.start_welcome: WELCOME to the NAVA PEACE adventure!
howtoplay.tokens_title: How do I get my first NAVA tokens?
howtoplay.tokens_p1: Your daily PEACE LOVER mission is to:
howtoplay.tokens_li1: Open the app once every 24 hours (more often as you level up)
howtoplay.tokens_li2: Click the button: "Today, I commit to peace, for everyone, everywhere."
howtoplay.tokens_congrats: Congratulations! Your daily action for peace is complete! See you tomorrow!
howtoplay.tokens_tip1: Tip: Set a daily alarm so you never miss your mining session.
howtoplay.tokens_tip2: By inviting your friends with your referral code, you earn extra tokens.
howtoplay.invite_title: How does the invitation system Work?
howtoplay.invite_p1: After sending an invitation to your friends with your unique code, they become active when they start playing!
howtoplay.invite_p2: 1 active friend = reward = 1 token per active friend
howtoplay.invite_p3: If your friend remains inactive for 3 days, you won't receive your FREE daily token. So, encourage your friends to stay active!
howtoplay.invite_p4: No multi-level system. No pyramid scheme. Just a simple, transparent, and fair reward structure.
howtoplay.invite_p5: Get ready to earn free NFTs (level badges) and climb the ranks!
howtoplay.invite_p6: The more invitations you send, the greater your chances of receiving FREE NFTs and seeing your rewards skyrocket.
howtoplay.invite_p7: 1 token per active friend is huge. Since mining will be deflationary, the invitation token will always be worth it.
howtoplay.nft_title: How do I get NAVA PEACE NFTs?
howtoplay.nft_p1: NFTs are available from the first day of the gamification app's launch.
howtoplay.nft_payment: Payment options: credit card or cryptocurrency.
howtoplay.nft_why_p2: Later, perhaps, have the chance to serve on the foundation's board of directors for a season.
howtoplay.nft_why_p3: An NFT = a mining accelerator, a future investment, a proof of trust = an unconditional commitment
howtoplay.mining_title: What is mining in NAVA PEACE? How does it Work?
howtoplay.mining_p1: Phase 1: Imagine NAVA PEACE as a giant global video game where everyone strives to make the planet a little kinder each day, with a common end goal:
howtoplay.mining_p2: To create a peace economy by connecting the entire World Within a single community.
howtoplay.mining_p3: To share "I choose peace today, for everyone, everywhere in the world," all you have to do is tap a magic button in the app.
howtoplay.mining_p4:
And when you tap that button... something amazing happens.
You earn NAVA tokens. This is called mining. Every transaction is recorded on the blockchain. It's irreversible, immutable, and anonymous.
howtoplay.what_mining_p1: Mining is a process that takes place on the blockchain with every peaceful action you perform. Each action is recorded and visible to all users connected to the blockchain. All actions are tallied and linked to a wallet: yours.
howtoplay.what_mining_p2: You don't need a machine or electricity.
howtoplay.what_mining_p3: All you need is your phone and your willingness to participate.
howtoplay.how_mining_title: How does mining Work in NAVA PEACE?
howtoplay.how_mining_li2: If you return every day → you earn more.
howtoplay.how_mining_li3: By reaching referral milestones, you will receive a free NFT allowing you to boost your mining speed!
howtoplay.how_mining_p2:
Your friends' activity
If you invite friends → you earn more.
howtoplay.how_mining_p3:
But your friends must play to receive your daily reward for their participation. Teamwork! Human chain!
If you are consistent (streaks), you earn more!
howtoplay.how_mining_p5: If you reach higher levels → you can mine faster.
howtoplay.how_mining_p6: Does everyone earn the same amount?
howtoplay.how_mining_p7:
Yes and no.
The rules of the game are the same for everyone, but if some have many friends or invest in NFTs to progress faster, then they will earn significantly more tokens.
howtoplay.halving_title: Every 30 days, the mining reward will be halved.
howtoplay.halving_p1: This system ensures fairness for everyone and rewards your actions: it's called the halving.
howtoplay.halving_p2: If rewards remained high indefinitely, the system would be flooded with tokens and their value would decrease significantly. The halving slows production over time, preserves scarcity, controls inflation, and rewards early participants, while ensuring economic stability for everyone.
howtoplay.halving_r1:
Days 1-30: Difficulty level 1.
Each click on the "Peace" button earns you 1 token.
howtoplay.halving_r2:
Days 31-60: Difficulty level 2.
Each click on the "Peace" button earns you 0.5 tokens.
howtoplay.halving_r3:
Days 61-90: Difficulty level 4.
Each click on the "Peace" button earns you 0.25 tokens.
howtoplay.halving_r4:
From day 91 to day 120, the difficulty is 8.
Each click on the "Peace" button earns you 0.125 tokens.
howtoplay.halving_r5:
From day 121 to day 150, the difficulty is 16.
Each click on the "Peace" button earns you 0.0625 tokens.
howtoplay.halving_r6:
From day 151 to day 180, the difficulty is 32.
Each click on the "Peace" button earns you 0.03125 tokens.
howtoplay.halving_p4: HALVING the tokens is necessary to preserve their value and fairness.
howtoplay.halving_p5: Together, let's build a peaceful economy through millions of peaceful actions.
howtoplay.season_title: What happens at the end of SEASON 1?
howtoplay.season_p2:
During these 180 days, YOU, the miners, create the economic base of the NAVA PEACE token.
This represents 20% of the total supply issued.
howtoplay.season_p3: At the end of SEASON 1, the smart contract generates the remaining 80% of the supply.
howtoplay.season_p4: For example: if 100 million tokens are issued during Season 1, 400 million NAVA PEACE tokens will be issued simultaneously for a total supply of 500 million tokens.
howtoplay.season_p5: These tokens will then be automatically sent to the destination wallet as follows:
howtoplay.access_title: When will I be able to access my tokens?
howtoplay.access_p1:
You will have access to your tokens at the end of the 180-day season.
At the end of Season 1:
howtoplay.access_li2: The NAVA PEACE WORLD app will be available.
howtoplay.access_li3:
The liquidity pool will give your tokens their true value.
Example: 1 Token = 1 USD
howtoplay.access_p2:
Once the blockchain is live, the token will become a Cryptocurrency, like Bitcoin or Ethereum.
You will then be able to:
howtoplay.access_li4: trade your tokens on decentralized exchanges;
howtoplay.access_li5: pay for services and products via the NAVA PEACE WORLD app;
howtoplay.access_li7: order a NAVA PEACE credit card from NAVA PEACE BANK;
howtoplay.access_li9: transfer NAVA tokens, donate NAVA PEACE tokens to your favorite NGO...
howtoplay.wallet_title: How is your digital Wallet secured?
howtoplay.wallet_p1: A digital wallet is generated automatically.
howtoplay.wallet_li1: To secure it, a 24-word recovery phrase is used.
howtoplay.wallet_li4: An auto-generated wallet is a crypto wallet created without any technical action on your part.
howtoplay.wallet_li8: and associates it with the user.
howtoplay.phase2: In Phase 2, We will launch the "Nava Peace World" app, a super app connecting you to the entire market of PEACE LOVERS WorldWide.

roadmap.phase1_li2: October 25, 2025: Creation of the first viable prototype.

roadmap.phase2_foundation2: Establishment of the Peace Council (advisers and experts)

roadmap.phase3_li2: Official launch of the NAVA PEACE token and establishment of a real economy

roadmap.phase3_li4: Interactive map of NAVA PEACE merchants
roadmap.phase3_li6: Wallet (integrated non-custodial wallet, i.e., total control of your assets)
roadmap.phase3_li7: DEX (Decentralized exchange for trading your tokens)
roadmap.phase3_p2: Each transaction generated on our blockchain will generate transaction fees, which will be distributed as follows every 30 days:
roadmap.phase3_p3: In addition to allowing all users to geolocate NAVA PEACE merchants (all types of services and products):
roadmap.phase3_merchant1: Each entrepreneur can send a daily offer to the community
roadmap.phase3_merchant2: Receive all payments in NAVA PEACE
roadmap.phase3_p4:
Development of the DAO governance system
First humanitarian missions funded by the Peace Foundation
roadmap.phase4_p1: NAVA PEACE becomes a true global peace economy.
roadmap.phase4_li2: NAVA Blockchain recognized as a "pro-peace" exchange system
roadmap.phase4_li5: "Peace Builders" program: funding international humanitarian projects
roadmap.phase4_li6: Expansion into the metaverse and immersive experiences
roadmap.phase4_li7: Goal: 1 to 3 billion citizens of peace
roadmap.phase4_li8: Creation of the Peace Index, a global measure of impact
founder.heading: ABOUT THE FOUNDER
founder.p1: My name is Alan August, I am an entrepreneur, globetrotter, life lover and world citizen. Witnessing over the years all these suffering, I asked to myself and to my friends: How, in 2025, cannot we live in peace, how ?
founder.p2: NAVA PEACE is my answer and my humble invitation, to change the world.
founder.p3: "Guys, I am just a random dude dropped here 50 years ago by accident. My dude Steeve shared with me his pain about the suffering of Palestinian kids, I think it was the beginning of my deep reflection "and me what do I do, how can I help?".
founder.p4: A few months later, I spent 25 days in a Buddhist temple in Chiang Mai, in northern Thailand. I went there to find myself, to reconnect with the "me" that had been lost over the years, buried under the noise and chaos of life. A Vipassana, a silent retreat, is a journey inward. A way to return to oneself. A way to find peace, to reset, and to shine again. One of those days, I received this vision, an inspiration that came to me with clarity. We cannot continue this way...
founder.p5: There is not better investment than a world at peace.
founder.p6: With NAVA PEACE App each tap is a whisper of peace in becoming. Millions of whispers become a voice the world cannot ignore.
footer.tagline: Built with love, courage and a deep belief that peace begins within.
game2economy.heading:
FROM GAME
TO ECONOMY
game2economy.sub: How a daily gesture becomes a global peace economy.
game2economy.step1_text: Every day, you open the app and click "I choose peace." This simple gesture is your daily commitment — and it mines NAVA tokens.
game2economy.step2_text: Your action is recorded on the blockchain. Each click generates tokens — a real digital currency, not just points. The more you play, the more you earn.
game2economy.step3_text: Millions of players create a massive token ecosystem. 50% funds the Foundation for humanitarian aid. The rest powers a new economy — the first economy of peace.
game2economy.why_token: A token is a digital unit of value, like a coin in a video game — except this one is real. When you play NAVA PEACE, your daily action creates tokens on the blockchain. These tokens can be exchanged, saved, or used to support humanitarian causes. Tokenizing peace means giving your commitment a measurable, tradable, and transparent value. For the first time, peace has an economy.
game2economy.quote: "If war is a market, then peace must become an economic force."
game2economy.summary: Gamification is not a gimmick — it's the engine. By turning peace into a daily practice, we create the collective momentum needed to build a real, tokenized peace economy backed by blockchain transparency.
